title: Green Thumb Industries Q3 2024 Revenue Growth Analysis
text: Green Thumb Industries reported Q3 2024 revenue growth, demonstrating the company's ability to maintain growth momentum in a competitive market. The company's quarterly revenue of $287 million represented a 4% year-over-year increase, though the growth rate was moderated by comparable store sales decline of 2.7%. This reflects the challenging retail environment with significant pricing pressures. However, the strong CPG revenue growth of over 15% offset some of the retail headwinds. The company's ability to drive growth in higher-margin CPG products demonstrates successful brand differentiation. Green Thumb's national footprint across 14 states and 98 retail locations positions it well to capitalize on market opportunities as regulations evolve. The company's adjusted EBITDA margin of 31% in Q3 demonstrates operational efficiency despite competitive pressures. Looking forward, the company faces continued challenges from pricing compression but maintains confidence in its ability to leverage brand strength.
